mapper.sql: p.portfolio_id, p.email, p.category, p.title, p.summary, p.content, p.work_start_at, p.work_end_at, p.is_public, p.banner_file_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.is_deleted, p.deleted_at

choose.when: ORDER BY p.created_at ASC, p.portfolio_id ASC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.portfolio_id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio p WHERE

SELECT
FROM portfolio p WHERE p.portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND p.is_deleted = 0
SELECT email FROM portfolio WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio ( email, category, title, summary, content, work_start_at, work_end_at, is_public, banner_file_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{category}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{workStartAt}, #{workEndAt}, #{isPublic}, #{bannerFileId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio SET category = #{dto.category}, title = #{dto.title}, summary = #{dto.summary}, content = #{dto.content}, work_start_at = #{dto.workStartAt}, work_end_at = #{dto.workEndAt}, is_public = #{dto.isPublic}, banner_file_id = #{dto.bannerFileId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE portfolio SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
